exploration_notes: 1. **TimeoutException class** — Defined at `clients/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/common/errors/TimeoutException.java:22` as `public class TimeoutException extends RetriableException`. 2. **Record batch expiration logic** — Two key files: (a) `RecordAccumulator.java` defines `expiredBatches(long now)` at line 465 which iterates over queued batches and collects those past the delivery timeout; (b) `Sender.java` calls `this.accumulator.expiredBatches(now)` at line 407 and constructs the exact err
